steps.title: Focus on methods
steps.content: The student wants the study's research methods, meaning what Moreno's team did. The notes say rock samples were collected from two seafloor ridges and analyzed for period of formation and oxidation level.

steps.title: Reject goals and conclusions
steps.content: Choice A gives background and purpose. Choice C describes the study's broad aim. Choice D describes an intended challenge to previous theories. The methods-focused option names the samples and the measurements performed on them. The answer is B.
